arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich tried to get Serhou Guirassy last summer; Kim Min-jae leads Bundesliga in mistakes for goals; Real Madrid and Liverpool making moves?; Former Inter Milan, Bayern star torn; and MORE!
arts.sum: Former Inter Milan and Bayern Munich center-back Lúcio was torn on which team he would support when two of his former clubs square off in the Champions League. Bayern Munich will travel to San Siro to face off with Inter Milan in the Champions League with a massive part of its season on the line.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany ready for “special night” as Bayern Munich and Inter Milan prepare for throwdown
arts.sum: Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany knows his team is down 2-1 entering the second leg of the Champions League tie, but is prepared for what should be a great atmosphere. Hopefully, we can experience a very special night for our fans, too,” said Kompany (via @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: FC Bayern Campus Round Up: Bayern II snap winless streak emphatically, Felipe Chávez makes his case for a pro contract and more...
arts.sum: Bayern’s U-19 team traveled to bottom of the table Chemnitzer in the final match of the U-19 Bundesliga, knowing their progression to the Round of 16 of the final phase of the U-19 league was already secure. Jensen has had a much harder time in the second half of the season than the first, in which he seemed unstoppable, but the Danish playmaker has had to make do with being double or triple teamed whenever he get the ball.

arts.ttl: Break a leg! Bayern Munich prez takes old saying too literally ahead of Inter Milan battle
arts.sum: If you’ve come to one of our shows, or any theater performance in general, odds are you’ve heard the term “break a leg,” and maybe even used it to wish performers good luck. If you were to tell the actor to “break a leg,” you were wishing them the opportunity to perform and get paid.

arts.ttl: Inter vs Bayern Munich: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Inter host Bayern Munich in the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final. Preview includes team news, TV information, and a score prediction.

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Huijsen to turn down Real Madrid and Bayern, Chelsea chase Brighton star
arts.sum: The January transfer window is now little more than a distant memory in European football and as such clubs across the continent are already making plans for the summer window. Teams are working...

arts.ttl: Can Harry Kane fulfill Champions League ambitions in Munich?
arts.sum: “And we have the opportunity to do that this year, but also to do it at home in front of our fans, I think that would make it even more special. A first UCL trophy — in the year of his first ever trophy — in a Final set for the Allianz Arena, home stadium to his current club?

arts.ttl: Bayern's Neuer to miss UCL match against Inter
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be without injured goalkeeper Manuel Neuer in Wednesday's Champions League quarterfinal second leg at Italy's Inter Milan after he failed to recover in time for the game, the club said on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Only Thomas Tuchel wanted Leon Goretzka out at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: “To date, no Bayern official has spoken negatively about Leon,” Rummenigge went on, as if to put a fine point on the contrast. Among those is an intriguing — though probably not altogether stunning — mini-revelation from board member and former chair Karl-Heinz Rummenigge on Leon Goretzka.

arts.ttl: Champions League: Barcelona lose 3-1, but will face Inter or Bayern Munich
arts.sum: If Inter go through to the Champions League semi-finals, then they will be up against...
